summary: Template generalizes numbered workflow catalog
detail: Book describes 10 numbered workflows and a domain agent routing table. Template parameterizes these as project-configurable. Tools list adds 'todo' and 'agent' not explicitly named in chapter.

summary: Template adds team topology graph; generalizes dependency matrix
detail: Book: 'chapter dependency matrix'. Template: 'component dependencies' + pipeline-graph.md team topology. Functionally equivalent with generalized naming.

summary: Template has 4 security rules; book has 6
detail: Book defines security rules S-1 through S-6. The template condenses this to S-1 through S-4, omitting some book-project-specific infrastructure protections such as path sanitisation and local credential handling. Eight review triggers match.

summary: Rule set completely redesigned; technical accuracy split to technical-validator
detail: Book: 16 rules (CH-01 through CH-16) focused on technical accuracy (source fidelity, excerpt accuracy, pipeline descriptions, directory claims, etc.), cross-references, consistency, and formatting. Template: 20 rules (CH-01 through CH-20) focused on file hygiene, script lifecycle, anti-sprawl, modularity, imports, and code quality. The book's technical accuracy auditing (CH-01 through CH-08) has been moved to the new domain agent technical-validator. This is the largest structural divergence in the audit.

summary: Two conflict codes renamed; routing adds direct delegation
detail: Book categories CITATION_MISSING (CM) and CITATION_MISMATCH (CX) renamed to REFERENCE_MISSING (RM) and REFERENCE_MISMATCH (RX) in template (consistent with reference-manager generalization). Template routes RM/RX directly to @reference-manager and SOURCE_DRIFT to @technical-validator. Book routes all conflicts through conflict-resolution.

summary: Template adds per-code decision rules
detail: Book describes general ACCEPT/REJECT/REVISE framework with authority hierarchy. Template adds explicit decision rules per conflict code (e.g. TM→use highest-authority term; CC→accept higher-authority claim; AE→verify against external source).

summary: 8 presupposition categories reduced to 6; classification system redesigned
detail: Book: 8 categories (DATA_STATE, SYSTEM_STATE, CAUSAL_CLAIM, SCOPE_BOUNDARY, TEMPORAL, BEHAVIORAL, IDENTITY, POLICY). Template: 6 categories (Empirical, Logical, Behavioral, Scope, Temporal, Causal). Dropped IDENTITY and POLICY. Added 'Logical' (not in book). Merged DATA_STATE/SYSTEM_STATE into 'Empirical'. Renamed remaining categories. Template uses simpler 4-question falsification; book describes per-category validation requirements.

summary: Template adds PII scan and placeholder resolution
detail: Both share change-to-agent impact matrix, invariant core preservation, living-document policy. Template adds security scans for PII and unresolved placeholders (generic concerns for template instantiation).

summary: Template emphasizes YAML frontmatter compliance; book emphasizes violation codes
detail: Book: 4-condition extraction test, 10 violation codes (AR-01 through AR-10), economics of extraction. Template: YAML frontmatter compliance (6 fields), slug resolution, handoff completeness. Template drops violation codes in favor of spec-field validation.

summary: Essentially consistent
detail: Both implement 4-gate safety architecture, protected-file categories, security clearance requirement. Template parameterizes protected paths with placeholders.

summary: Book-specific agent generalized to domain-agnostic template
detail: 'Book-content expert' → 'primary producer'. 'Chapter Briefs' → 'Component Briefs'. HTML-specific composition → format-agnostic {PRIMARY_OUTPUT_DIR}. Core workflow (receive brief, draft, submit for review) preserved.

summary: Expert-critic generalized; adds formal defect codes
detail: 'Expert-critic' → 'quality auditor'. Adds 4 formal defect codes (Q-STR, Q-LGC, Q-LLM, Q-PRO). Core function (structural/logical/prose-quality audit) preserved.

summary: Argument-weaver generalized; adds formal failure types
detail: 'Argument-weaver' → 'cohesion repairer'. Adds 5 formal failure types (disjointedness, broken given-new chain, missing spine, implicit transitions, topic drift). Section-level scope rules preserved.

summary: Voice-style agent generalized to style guardian
detail: 'Voice-style agent' → 'style guardian'. Three-priority E/A/V audit structure preserved. Exclusive constitutional authority over voice rulings preserved.

summary: Bibliography manager generalized; adds CRUD and tiered verification
detail: 'Bibliography manager' → 'reference manager'. BibTeX/BibLaTeX → generic reference database. Adds explicit CRUD operations and 4-tier verification scheme (DOI/ISBN/URL/personal communication). Anti-fabrication rule preserved.

summary: HTML-document-builder generalized to format converter
detail: 'HTML-document-builder' → 'format converter'. HTML→LaTeX pipeline → configurable {CONVERSION_PIPELINE}. Validation approach (structure check, cross-reference survival, content count verification) preserved.

summary: LaTeX specialist generalized to output compiler; adds BUILD-MANIFEST
detail: 'LaTeX specialist' → 'output compiler'. LaTeX assembly → generic deliverable assembly. Adds BUILD-MANIFEST.md with component listing, sizes, hashes. Core responsibility (assemble converted components in order, resolve cross-references) preserved.

summary: Graphviz expert generalized to visual designer
detail: 'Graphviz expert' → 'visual designer'. Graphviz DOT language → configurable {DIAGRAM_TOOLS}. Consistent naming, revision history, source-file preservation rules preserved.

summary: Chapter expert generalized to workstream expert
detail: 'Chapter expert' → 'workstream expert'. 'Chapter Briefs' → 'Component Briefs'. Template-based instantiation with invariant structure + task-specific knowledge preserved. 3-revision-cycle escalation limit preserved.

summary: New domain agent split from book's code-hygiene agent
detail: Read-only domain agent verifying code examples, file paths, API signatures, command invocations, configuration values, and agent file excerpts match source on disk. In the book these responsibilities belong to Code-Hygiene Agent (Ch 8, rules CH-01 through CH-08). The template system splits technical accuracy auditing into this separate domain agent, while the universal code-hygiene template handles file hygiene and anti-sprawl.

summary: New tool-specific agent for build system management
detail: Manages build configuration, dependency resolution, compilation, artifact management. No book chapter counterpart. Part of the template's tool-agent archetype system.

summary: New tool-specific agent for CLI tool management
detail: Manages CLI tool configuration, execution, output parsing, CI integration. No book chapter counterpart. Part of tool-agent archetype system.

summary: New tool-specific agent for database management
detail: Manages schema migrations, parameterized queries, backups, credential rotation. No book chapter counterpart. Part of tool-agent archetype system.

summary: New research agent for tool documentation discovery
detail: Locates official documentation, API surfaces, usage patterns for tools. Partially maps to Docs-Researcher pipeline stage (Ch 18, Stage 1) but is scoped to tool metadata enrichment rather than daily external monitoring.

summary: New generic tool-specific agent template
detail: Manages configuration and invocation of general-purpose tools. Fallback template for tools that don't fit build-system, CLI, or database archetypes. No book chapter counterpart.

summary: New reference file for code-hygiene enforcement rules
detail: Not an agent. Authoritative enforcement catalog for CH-01 through CH-20+ rules. Extension point for domain-specific hygiene rules (CH-21+).

summary: New lightweight reference file per tool
detail: Not an agent. Quick-reference for tool version, config files, docs URL, API surface, patterns. Auto-generated for reference-tier tools.

summary: New meta-agent for team construction via Claude Projects
detail: Conducts 7-section intake interview and invokes build_team.py. No book chapter counterpart. Part of the template module's build pipeline.

summary: New meta-agent for team construction via Copilot CLI
detail: Conducts 10-step intake via CLI prompts and invokes build_team.py. No book chapter counterpart.

summary: New meta-agent for team construction via VS Code Copilot
detail: Conducts 8-section intake dialogue and invokes build pipeline. No book chapter counterpart.

summary: New project-level configuration template
detail: Not an agent. Defines conventions, authority hierarchy, agent team structure, constitutional rules, style rules for all Copilot agents in a project. Corresponds to copilot-instructions.md pattern described across multiple chapters.

summary: No template for cross-repo bottom-up audit agent
detail: Ch 17 describes the agent investigator: bottom-up audits across repositories, detects emergent patterns, flags documentation drift. 3 finding classes (emergent common features, structural placement inconsistencies, scope creep). Operates as Stage 10 of daily pipeline. No corresponding template.

summary: No template for workspace-level coordination agent
detail: Ch 16 describes a workspace-level orchestrator coordinating abstract layer propagation across multiple repositories. Manages bidirectional propagation (top-down Stage 8, bottom-up Stages 10-11). No corresponding template.

summary: No template for repository topology discovery agent
detail: Ch 16 describes the collector-discovery agent: identifies which repositories have agent teams, discovers topology. Part of three-meta-agent propagation architecture. No corresponding template.

summary: No template for template compliance checking agent
detail: Ch 16 describes the agent-abstraction-reviewer: compares repository-level agent files against abstract templates, classifies differences (intentional extension, accidental drift, novel pattern). Core to the abstract layer architecture. No corresponding template.

summary: No template for pipeline best-practices analyst
detail: Ch 18 Stage 2: evaluates documentation changes against 5 quality dimensions. No corresponding template.

summary: No template for pipeline implementation advisor
detail: Ch 18 Stage 3: generates adoption guidance for documentation changes. No corresponding template.

summary: No template for pipeline report compiler
detail: Ch 18 Stage 4: synthesizes three parallel research streams into daily summary. No corresponding template.

summary: No template for pipeline documentation updater
detail: Ch 18 Stage 5: integrates newly identified best practices into agent profile files. Overlaps with agent-updater but is pipeline-stage scoped. No corresponding template.

summary: No template for pipeline contradiction detector
detail: Ch 18 Stage 6: scans agent docs against consistency rules. Overlaps with conflict-auditor but is pipeline-stage scoped. May not need separate template.

summary: No template for pipeline refactoring recommender
detail: Ch 18 Stage 7: reviews flagged files for structural defects and generates prioritized remediation list. Overlaps with agent-refactor but is pipeline-stage scoped. May not need separate template.

summary: No template for pipeline cross-repo propagator
detail: Ch 18 Stage 8: applies architectural improvements to target repositories and runs post-propagation audits. No corresponding template.

summary: No template for pipeline health monitor
detail: Ch 18 Stage 9: evaluates pipeline execution quality, classifies stage results, assesses documentation health. No corresponding template.
